text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. One key task is image recognition, where a system identifies objects or scenes within a photo. A more advanced technique is object detection, which not only recognizes objects but also locates them within an image. These technologies have many real-world applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision is used to detect pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles, allowing the car to navigate safely. Other applications include facial recognition on smartphones and quality control in manufacturing.
